errors.description: The (tenant_id, slug) tuple already exists. Slugs are unique per tenant (partial unique WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — soft-deleted rows do not collide).

Attempted a slug listed in config('organization.validation.reserved_slugs') without the system-context bypass. Reserved list includes `admin`, `api`, `platform`, `system`, `default`, `www`, `app`, `static`, `test`, `internal`.
Reached `organization_slot` cap. Response includes the current tier + upgrade path. Small tier is locked to 1 (the default org).
Tenant lacks the `organization_hierarchy` boolean entitlement + attempted parent_id != null. Enterprise-only feature. Response includes upgrade path.
Tenant lacks the `organization_reparent` boolean entitlement + attempted POST /reparent. Distinct from creation-time nesting.
Tenant lacks the `organization_branding` boolean entitlement + attempted to write logo_url/primary_color/secondary_color/description. Medium+ feature. The tenant-level Branding still applies.

The proposed parent_id belongs to a different tenant. Enforced by `parent_same_tenant` rule + OrganizationObserver — a defense-in-depth check on top of the tenant scope. Never expected in a well-formed request; when observed, indicates either an integration bug or an attempted lateral-move attack.
Proposed parent_id is a descendant of the current node — would create a cycle. Response includes the offending `cycle_path` array so the UI can visualise the loop.
The proposed parent's tree_depth + 1 exceeds config('organization.hierarchy.max_depth'). Response includes current cap + this node's descendant-max-depth.
Proposed parent_id references a non-existent (or soft-deleted) row.
Attempted to delete an Organization while at least one descendant Organization still exists. Move or archive descendants first. Response includes `descendant_count`.
Attempted to delete/archive an Organization referenced by one or more `branches` rows. Archive/reassign the branches first. Response includes `branch_count`.
Attempted to delete / archive / pause the tenant's is_default=true Organization without first promoting another row to default. Enforced by OrganizationObserver + DeleteOrganizationAction.
Requested status transition is not valid from the current state (e.g. resume from archived). Response includes the allowed transitions.
The tenant has zero or 2+ is_default=true rows. Emitted by ReconcileDefaultOrganizationInvariantJob when `repair_mode=alert-only`. Reads are blocked until ops repairs the state.
A row's tree_path is inconsistent with its parent_id chain (materialised path drift). Fired by the health probe; reads through the tree cache are refused until RebuildTreePathsJob repairs the row.
